case_for: His pregame projection of 21.1 points and a recent 21.1-point outburst in week 6 show he still has the upside to clear 12 points when targets flow his way.
case_against: Four of his last six outings (10.8, 6.9, 4.9, 6.3) fell short of the 12-point threshold, showing inconsistent recent production.
